_meta.source: Vietnam CIT Law 2025 (PWC Tax Summary), State Bank of Vietnam refinancing rate, General Statistics Office inflation data
_meta.notes: Standard CIT 20%. Preferential 10% for renewable energy projects (4yr exempt + 9yr 50% reduction per CIT Law). Discount rates reflect Vietnam commercial lending environment. Escalation rates based on 5-year historical averages.

renewable_energy_preferential.notes: Applicable to projects qualifying under CIT Law for renewable energy: 10% CIT rate, 4-year full exemption from first revenue year, 50% reduction for 9 subsequent years. Model this via reduced effective tax rate over analysis period.

tax_holiday.notes: REopt does not natively model multi-year tax holidays. Approximate by using the effective blended rate over the analysis period: (4*0 + 9*0.05 + 12*0.10) / 25 = 0.066. Or use owner_tax_rate_fraction=0.066 as a weighted average.

high_tech_zone.notes: Projects in designated high-tech zones or special economic zones may qualify for additional incentives. 10% CIT for 15 years, 4yr exempt + 9yr 50%. Consult local tax advisor.

reference_rates.notes: For context only — not directly used by the tool. Helps users calibrate their own assumptions.
reference_rates.vat_notes: 8% VAT on electricity (reduced from 10% per Resolution 2024). May revert to 10%.
